text: Timberwolves lose Anthony Edwards, Donte DiVincenzo to leg injuries in Game 4 - NBA
fullText: DiVincenzo’s season is over with an Achilles tendon injury and the severity of Edwards’ left knee injury remains unclear.

text: 2026 NFL Draft: Final snap grades for every team - NFL.com
fullText: Now that all seven rounds of the 2026 NFL Draft have been completed, Chad Reuter reveals his final snap grades for each team in the league.

text: Trump rushed off stage after shots fired at White House Correspondents’ Dinner - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump was swiftly escorted off the stage by Secret Service after possible shots were fired at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner in Washington, DC, on Saturday.

text: Chicago police officer dead, another critically wounded in shooting at Swedish Hospital; suspect in custody - Chicago Sun-Times
fullText: The suspected shooter had been taken to Swedish Hospital Sautrday morning after being arrested for robbery, Chicago's top cop said. The suspect fled the hospital after the shooting and was later taken into custody nearby.

text: Top buyers of Trump meme coin join Mike Tyson, others at lavish Mar-a-Lago event - The Washington Post
fullText: Top holders of Donald Trump’s meme coin got a conference at Mar-a-Lago, featuring Trump-branded swag and potential facetime, even as the coin has lost value.

text: Undrafted free-agent signings tracker: Every team's UDFAs after the 2026 NFL Draft - NFL.com
fullText: Keep up with the undrafted rookie free-agent signings with a team-by-team list of player acquisitions following the 2026 NFL Draft.

text: Mexico says 2 CIA agents killed in crash weren't authorized to participate in local raid - CBS News
fullText: The role of the two CIA agents, who were returning from destroying a clandestine drug lab in the northern Mexican state of Chihuahua, remains unclear.

text: Megan Thee Stallion Blasts Klay Thompson: ‘Cheating, Had Me Around Your Whole Family Playing House’ - Yahoo
fullText: Megan Thee Stallion addresses her breakup with NBA player Klay Thompson due to infidelity and his lack of commitment.

text: 'Storage Wars' star Rene Nezhoda offers new details on alleged cyberbullying Darrell Sheets experienced before death - Entertainment Weekly
fullText: 'Storage Wars' star Rene Nezhoda has offered new details about the alleged cyberbullying his castmate Darrell Sheets experienced before his death: 'He kind of withdrew.'

text: In a rare interview, a leader of the world's largest right-wing group talks to NPR - NPR
fullText: The second-in-command of the RSS, a Hindu nationalist organization in India, rarely speaks to the Western press. Here's what he said about his group's controversial history.

text: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war - BBC
fullText: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.

text: Photos show China’s automakers unveiling the future of driving at Beijing auto show - AP News
fullText: BEIJING (AP) — China’s top automakers unveil cutting-edge models and technology at the Beijing auto show, highlighting advances in intelligent driving, ultrafast charging and electric vehicles.

text: Dirk Kempthorne, former Idaho governor and U.S. Interior secretary, dies at 74 - Politico
fullText: The Republican was diagnosed with colon cancer last year.

text: Senate panel schedules vote to advance Warsh as Powell probe dropped - The Washington Post
fullText: Senate panel schedules Wednesday vote on Kevin Warsh after U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro drops criminal probe into Fed Chair Jerome H. Powell.

text: Trump ousts National Science Board members - The Washington Post
fullText: Members of the independent board that guides the National Science Foundation said they received a notice from the White House that their position was being terminated.

text: Cyndi Lauper Claps Back at Heckler During Vegas Residency Debut - Variety
fullText: Cyndi Lauper didn’t hold back when a heckler interrupted her opening night in Las Vegas.

text: Jermod McCoy will let team doctors decide if he needs another knee surgery - NBC Sports

text: ICE re-arrests El Gamal family after judges freed them - The Texas Tribune
fullText: A federal judge Saturday afternoon ruled that an Egyptian family of six should not immediately be deported after immigration agents suddenly re-arrested the family hours earlier.
